features.description: The copied workspace contains the portable bootstrap files and runtime helpers for the research profile.
steps: Copy the template into a new workspace
Verify the runtime directories and helper scripts

features.description: The placeholder prompt, bindings, schema, and workflow are replaced with research-specific contracts.
steps: Customize the domain schema and workflow

features.description: The reference research catalog is seeded into a fresh harness SQLite database.
steps: Customize .harness/live-mission-catalog.json with real sources and deadlines

features.description: The dry-run wrapper can claim the first ready research issue without mutating the canonical live database.
steps: Verify sandbox state changes while canonical state remains intact

features.description: The preview-first live claim wrapper exposes the synthesis and handoff queue with peer-review workflow metadata intact.
steps: Confirm recipients, approvals, and external refs survive into the ready issue payload
